categories.label: Route Points
categories.description: Points from claimed routes (1-6 trains = 1-15 pts)

categories.label: Completed Tickets
categories.description: Add point value of each completed destination ticket

categories.label: Incomplete Tickets
categories.description: Subtract point value of uncompleted tickets (enter as negative)

categories.label: Longest Continuous Route
categories.description: 10 bonus points for longest continuous path
